response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and diverse experience across multiple domains, but his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ on Windows and capital markets/fixed income expertise. His communication skills and problem-solving abilities are evident, but the domain and technical gaps are significant.
strengths: Proven track record of full-stack development and technical leadership across multiple industries.
Strong communication skills, as evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Experience with modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, microservices) and diverse programming languages.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, and Node.js).
No evident experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domains.
Lack of SQL Server/Oracle experience (only MongoDB and MySQL listed).
